items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for guardrails against duplicate recovery spam, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these guardrails. The lack of specific evidence leads to an inconclusive status, as the necessary information to assess the requirement is missing.
